summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TuneDrop app with Kalmori design implementation. All key design elements and user flows are working correctly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with KALMORI logo and gradient animation
G.O.A.T headline with typewriter effect for 'Music Distribution'
Black background implementation across all pages
Red CTA buttons with proper styling
Gold pricing highlights in pricing section
Login page with KALMORI branding and form functionality
Register page with KALMORI branding and all form fields
Dashboard page with purple gradient theme
User login flow with admin credentials (admin@tunedrop.com)
Successful authentication and redirection to dashboard
KALMORI branding consistency across all pages
Purple gradient theme elements (7 elements found)
